candidate_problem_record.subject: Chemistry
candidate_problem_record.raw_question_text: A beaker is filled with some 1.0 M $\text{CuSO}_4$, and two carbon electrodes are placed in the beaker with a battery wired between them, as shown below. As current is run through the system, solid copper plates out onto the carbon cathode. Which of the following changes would increase the amount of solid copper that is plated out of solution?
candidate_problem_record.raw_answer_text: Using a 9.0 V battery instead of a 1.5 V battery
candidate_problem_record.multi_solution_policy_rationale: 该数据集更可能以单解题为主，不强推多解 agent，只保留基础可验证性与可标注性检查。

metadata.question_zh:
一个烧杯中充满约1.0 mol/L $\text{CuSO}_4$溶液,并将两个碳电极放入溶液中,电极之间连接有电池。当通电时,固体铜会在碳阴极上析出。以下哪项改变会增加析出的固体铜的量?

A. 用1.0 mol/L $\text{CuCl}_2$溶液替换1.0 mol/L $\text{CuSO}_4$溶液
B. 使用9.0 V电池代替1.5 V电池
C. 降低溶液的pH
D. 用铂电极替换碳电极
metadata.explanation_zh: 使用电压更高的电池会导致更大的电流流过,进而使更多的铜离子从溶液中析出,沉积在阴极上的铜的质量也就更大。
